moments.title: World Cup Final Showdown
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup culminates this Sunday with Spain facing Argentina in the final, featuring a closing ceremony performance by Post Malone.

angles.name: Match Hype
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! Spain vs. Argentina in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final this Sunday. Who are you backing?

angles.name: Post Malone Ceremony
angles.copy: Before the final whistle, Post Malone takes the stage for the World Cup closing ceremony. Get ready for the ultimate pre-match show!

angles.name: Football Fever
angles.copy: Two giants, one trophy. The World Cup final is set to be an absolute thriller. Where will you be watching Spain take on Argentina?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Make Chart History
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' has become the longest-running UK number-one single by a British act, reaching 17 non-consecutive weeks at the top.

angles.name: Record Breaker
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is now the longest-running UK No.1 by a British act. Incredible!

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: 17 weeks at Number 1! Massive congratulations to Sam Fender and Olivia Dean. What a track!

moments.title: Oasis's 'Wonderwall' Back in Top 10
moments.blurb: Oasis's iconic 'Wonderwall' has surged 9 places to Number 2 on the Official Singles Chart, becoming an unofficial anthem for England's World Cup run.

angles.name: Football Anthem
angles.copy: It's back! Oasis's 'Wonderwall' rockets to Number 2 on the charts, fueled by England's World Cup journey. Pure nostalgia.

angles.name: 90s Revival
angles.copy: Never underestimate a classic. 'Wonderwall' proving its timeless appeal with a huge jump on the Official Singles Chart.

moments.title: Shakira & Burna Boy's World Cup Anthem Climbs
moments.blurb: The official 2026 FIFA World Cup anthem, 'Dai Dai' by Shakira and Burna Boy, has broken into the Official Singles Chart Top 5.

angles.name: World Cup Vibe
angles.copy: Getting us in the mood for the final! Shakira & Burna Boy's 'Dai Dai' is now a Top 5 hit.

angles.name: Chart Fresh
angles.copy: Shakira and Burna Boy bringing the heat to the Official Singles Chart with the World Cup anthem 'Dai Dai'.

moments.title: Olivia Rodrigo New Entry
moments.blurb: Olivia Rodrigo's new track 'honeybee' has debuted in the Official Singles Chart Top 40, marking her 17th Top 40 hit.

angles.name: New Chart Hit
angles.copy: Another one! Olivia Rodrigo's 'honeybee' buzzes into the Top 40. Listen out for it!

angles.name: Pop Powerhouse
angles.copy: Olivia Rodrigo just keeps delivering the hits. 'honeybee' is her 17th Top 40 single!

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Kick Off
moments.blurb: The summer school holidays officially begin for many children in England and Wales from Monday, July 20.

angles.name: Schools Out
angles.copy: Freedom! Summer holidays are officially here for many students in England and Wales from Monday. Time for adventures!

angles.name: Holiday Mode
angles.copy: No more alarms! Who's ready for a summer of fun as the school holidays begin?

angles.name: Welsh Summer Break
angles.copy: Holidays Hwyl! The summer break officially starts for many schools across Wales from Monday. Enjoy the sunshine!

moments.title: Happy Birthday M.I.A.
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, and songwriter M.I.A. (Mathangi Arulpragasam) celebrates her 51st birthday tomorrow, July 18. She was born in 1975.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're wishing a very Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only M.I.A.! Get 'Paper Planes' on repeat. #MIA

angles.name: Iconic Artist
angles.copy: Celebrating the groundbreaking artist M.I.A. as she turns 51 tomorrow! What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday this Sunday, July 19. He was born in 1947.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the incredible Brian May this Sunday! Rock on, Sir Brian!

angles.name: Queen's Icon
angles.copy: The man behind the iconic riffs, Brian May turns 79 on Sunday! What's your favourite Queen song?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday this Monday, July 20. He was born in 1947.

angles.name: Guitar Maestro
angles.copy: Feel the rhythm! Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana on Monday. What a legend!

angles.name: Smooth Sounds
angles.copy: Celebrating the timeless talent of Carlos Santana, who turns 79 this Monday. From 'Oye Como Va' to 'Smooth', a true innovator.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and drummer Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday this Tuesday, July 21. He was born in 1947.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Don Henley this Tuesday! What's your favourite Eagles track?

angles.name: Voice of a Generation
angles.copy: Celebrating Don Henley of The Eagles, turning 79 on Tuesday! A true rock and roll legend.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Selena Gomez
moments.blurb: Singer, actress, and producer Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday this Wednesday, July 22. She was born in 1992.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the amazing Selena Gomez this Wednesday! What's your go-to Selena track?

angles.name: Multi-Talent
angles.copy: Celebrating Selena Gomez as she turns 34 on Wednesday! From Disney to chart-topper, she does it all.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic guitarist Slash (Saul Hudson) celebrates his 61st birthday this Thursday, July 23. He was born in 1965.

angles.name: Rock God
angles.copy: That top hat, those riffs! Happy 61st Birthday to the legendary Slash this Thursday! #Slash

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to Guns N' Roses' guitar maestro, Slash, turning 61 on Thursday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday this Friday, July 24. She was born in 1969.

angles.name: J-Lo's Day
angles.copy: Get ready to party! Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only Jennifer Lopez this Friday. Still Jenny from the Block! #JLo

angles.name: Superstar
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Jennifer Lopez as she turns 57 on Friday! What's your favourite J.Lo hit?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Verdine White
moments.blurb: Earth, Wind & Fire bassist Verdine White celebrates his 75th birthday this Saturday, July 25. He was born in 1951.

angles.name: Funk Master
angles.copy: Shining bright! Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire this Saturday. What a bassline!

angles.name: EWF Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring talent of Verdine White as he turns 75 on Saturday! Get those Earth, Wind & Fire classics on!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday this Sunday, July 26. He was born in 1943.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Happy 83rd Birthday to the iconic Mick Jagger this Sunday. What's your favourite Stones anthem?

angles.name: Ageless Performer
angles.copy: Celebrating the incomparable Mick Jagger as he turns 83 on Sunday! The ultimate rock and roll showman.
